content.text:
Implemented the fix in `src/activity_actor.cpp`.

What changed:
- `zone_sort_activity_actor::stage_think` now restores the zone-sort viewport lock when sorting resolves with no active `DO` stage and no remaining source coordinates.
- This covers cases where the activity starts, centers/locks the viewport on the Unsorted Zone, then discovers there is nothing actually sortable, such as:
  - items not in an Unsorted zone
  - items in an Unsorted zone with no valid destination zone

Validation performed:
- Added a temporary focused regression test reproducing the stuck viewport case.
- Confirmed it failed before the fix.
- Applied the fix.
- Confirmed the focused test passed.
- Removed the temporary test change as requested.
- Built the main game target successfully with:
  - `cmake --build "/testbed/build" --target cataclysm -j2`

Final tracked change:
- `src/activity_actor.cpp`

Note:
- The test run generated untracked test artifacts/directories already present or produced by the test harness, but no regression test files remain modified.

result:
Implemented the fix in `src/activity_actor.cpp`.

What changed:
- `zone_sort_activity_actor::stage_think` now restores the zone-sort viewport lock when sorting resolves with no active `DO` stage and no remaining source coordinates.
- This covers cases where the activity starts, centers/locks the viewport on the Unsorted Zone, then discovers there is nothing actually sortable, such as:
  - items not in an Unsorted zone
  - items in an Unsorted zone with no valid destination zone

Validation performed:
- Added a temporary focused regression test reproducing the stuck viewport case.
- Confirmed it failed before the fix.
- Applied the fix.
- Confirmed the focused test passed.
- Removed the temporary test change as requested.
- Built the main game target successfully with:
  - `cmake --build "/testbed/build" --target cataclysm -j2`

Final tracked change:
- `src/activity_actor.cpp`

Note:
- The test run generated untracked test artifacts/directories already present or produced by the test harness, but no regression test files remain modified.
